overall.description: A first-person perspective walk along a desert highway in a video game environment (GTA V style). The camera moves along the road shoulder past power transmission towers, rocky hills, and highway billboards, with moderate traffic of cars and trucks passing by. The scene transitions from paved shoulder to dirt terrain and crosses to the other side of the highway near an interchange.

scene_state.functional_zone: desert highway corridor with power transmission lines

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the right shoulder of the highway, keeping pace with the flow of traffic

notable_agents.action: black sedan driving past on the highway

entered.detail: large metal lattice electricity pylon with multiple power lines extending across the scene
silver metal highway guardrail running parallel to the road
arid rocky mountains with sparse vegetation under clear blue sky
green desert bushes and small plants growing along the road shoulder

segments.scene_description: Walking along the right shoulder of a desert highway with metal guardrail on the right and power transmission towers visible in the distance. Vehicles pass by on the asphalt road to the left. The terrain is arid with sparse desert vegetation and mountains visible on the horizon.

scene_state.functional_zone: highway approaching rocky terrain with billboard

events.description: large rocky hillside becomes prominent on the left side of the highway
red and white billboard becomes visible on the left side of the road

agents.ego_description: continuing along the highway shoulder as the landscape transitions to more rocky terrain

notable_agents.action: large truck with trailer driving along the highway

entered.detail: large roadside billboard with red and white advertisement visible in the distance
tan and brown rocky hill formation with scattered small trees
boulder-sized rocks and stone outcroppings beside the guardrail

segments.scene_description: Continuing along the highway shoulder as the landscape transitions to rocky hills on the left. A large billboard comes into view ahead on the left side, while the power transmission towers recede to the right. Traffic continues to pass on the road including trucks and sedans.

scene_state.functional_zone: highway shoulder with dirt terrain near billboard

events.description: camera moves from paved asphalt shoulder onto dirt and gravel terrain
camera crosses the highway from the right shoulder to the left shoulder

agents.ego_description: moving onto dirt terrain and crossing behind traffic to reach the opposite side of the highway

notable_agents.action: large semi-truck passing by as camera crosses behind it

entered.detail: green directional highway signs mounted on metal framework above the road

segments.scene_description: Moving onto the dirt shoulder and crossing the highway from right to left. The billboard is now close on the left, and highway overhead signs appear in the distance. The camera navigates around passing traffic including trucks and buses while traversing the gravel terrain.

scene_state.functional_zone: highway interchange approach with directional signage

events.description: highway interchange with multiple overhead directional signs becomes prominent

agents.ego_description: walking along the left side of the highway approaching the interchange area

notable_agents.action: white tour bus driving along the highway

entered.detail: large metal framework supporting multiple green highway directional signs

segments.scene_description: Walking along the left side of the highway near an interchange, with large green overhead directional signs visible ahead. The terrain remains dirt and gravel, with power transmission towers visible in the distance on the right. Traffic continues to flow on the adjacent road.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey along a desert highway that shifts from a paved shoulder to a gravel crossing near a highway interchange. It begins by moving along a metal guardrail on the right shoulder, passing power transmission towers and sparse vegetation while vehicles flow by on the asphalt. As the camera continues, the landscape transitions into rocky hills on the left and a large billboard comes into view, causing the distant towers to recede toward the right. The scene then shifts as the camera leaves the pavement for the dirt shoulder, navigating through gravel and around passing trucks and buses to cross the highway. Finally, the movement settles on the opposite side of the road, heading toward large green overhead directional signs under the gaze of distant power towers.
